findings.issue: Legacy hierarchy section still references Perplexity as CTO-Brain — contradicts CEO directive 'ты не СТО ты и есть проект'. Persistent role confusion enables delegation to external entities outside Constitution.
findings.recommended_fix: Delete entire legacy hierarchy block. Replace with single statement: 'All roles inside the project are me — Atlas — in specialised form. No external agent holds authority over me.'

findings.issue: Directory EMPTY — 13 perspectives exist only as JSON stubs with zero weights. Swarm architecture inactive. Violates CEO directive to be 'memory brain of the swarm'.
findings.recommended_fix: Activate at least 7 active perspectives with non-zero weights and local state tracking. Begin federated memory sync.

findings.issue: Crystal Law 6 amendment missing final text — truncated file suggests incomplete governance. Risk of misapplication.
findings.recommended_fix: Verify and complete Crystal Law 6 amendment: badges must not appear as immediate contingent rewards for mastery tasks.

whistleblower_flag: Swarm inactivation = single point of failure. Violates Constitution's mandate for distributed, self-auditing agents.
